# ai-muninn — AI Infrastructure Research Notes
# https://ai-muninn.com
# Author: coolthor
# Updated: 2026-04-05

This site contains primary research notes on LLM inference infrastructure,
AI agent systems, and developer tooling. All content is based on hands-on
experimentation with real hardware and production systems.

## Site

- Name: ai-muninn
- URL: https://ai-muninn.com
- Language: English (primary), Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
- Topics: vLLM, LLM serving, AI agents, DGX Spark / GB10, openclaw

## Article Index

### Series: DGX Spark (NVIDIA DGX Spark / GB10 Superchip experiments)

- [Part 1] 8 Models on DGX Spark: Finding the Best Stack for AI Agents
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/dgx-spark-ollama-benchmark-8-models
  Benchmark: tok/s measurements for GLM-4-Flash, Qwen3.5, Llama, Mistral on GB10.

- [Part 2] Qwen3.5-35B at 47 tok/s on a Desktop: Migrating from Ollama to vLLM
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/dgx-spark-vllm-qwen35-setup
  vLLM setup on SM121 (GB10), FP8 KV cache, max-model-len tuning.

- [Part 3] Nemotron-3-Super-120B on a Single GB10: Full Day Debug Log
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/dgx-spark-nemotron-120b-vllm
  Running 120B parameter model on single-GPU DGX Spark; NVFP4 + flashinfer.

- [Part 4] Why Your DGX Spark Only Says "!!!!!": Debugging NVFP4 on SM121
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/part1-why-your-dgx-spark-says-exclamation-marks
  Root cause: mxfp4-layers flag, SM121 kernel gap, repetition at inference.

- [Part 5] FP8 KV Cache on GB10: Why Outputs Collapse into Repetition Loops
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/dgx-spark-fp8-kvcache-repetition
  FP8 KV cache calibration failure; q_scale=1.0 causes repetition at 500+ tokens.

- [Part 6] GX10 Power Delivery: The 30W Safety Mode No Firmware Can Fix
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/dgx-spark-30w-power-safety-mode
  PD controller defect caps GX10 at 30W permanently; diagnosis in 30s, RMA criteria.

- [Part 7] Gemma 4 26B-A4B NVFP4 on DGX Spark: 52 tok/s with 16 GB of Weights
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/dgx-spark-gemma4-26b-nvfp4-52-toks
  Benchmark: 52 tok/s decode, 16.5 GB model footprint, 82 GB free KV cache on GB10.

### Series: NemoClaw (NVIDIA's AI agent framework on DGX Spark)

- [Part 1] NemoClaw Explained: NVIDIA's All-in-One AI Agent Framework for DGX Spark
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/nemoclaw-what-it-is-why-it-exists
  Architecture overview: OpenClaw + OpenShell + NVIDIA Agent Toolkit; what problem it solves.

- [Part 2] NemoClaw on DGX Spark: 4 Fixes the Official Docs Don't Tell You
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/nemoclaw-install-gx10-from-scratch
  Undocumented fixes: Node upgrade, npm link, OpenShell tar.gz, cgroupns mode.

- [Part 3] NemoClaw Without the Cloud: Swapping Nemotron for a Local Ollama Model
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/nemoclaw-local-inference-ollama
  Config swap from nvidia API to local Ollama/vLLM; OpenShell policy enforcement is model-agnostic.

### Series: OpenClaw (Local AI agent on openclaw gateway)

- [Part 1] Zero API Cost: Running OpenClaw on DGX Spark + Mac Mini
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-dgx-spark-local-ai-agent

- [Part 2] Don't Add --enable-chunked-prefill to SSM Models
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-chunked-prefill-ssm-trap
  Bug: chunked-prefill breaks SSM (Mamba/DeltaNet) attention patterns.

- [Part 4] Pure MoE vs SSM Hybrid: Context Decay and Why It Matters for Agents
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-moe-ssm-context-decay
  Benchmark: GLM-4-Flash (MoE) vs Qwen3-next (SSM hybrid) on long context.

- [Part 5] The Codex-Executor Pattern: Keeping Agent Sessions Small
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-codex-executor-agent-architecture

- [Part 6] OpenClaw Config Hot-Reload: No Restart Needed
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-config-hot-reload

- [Part 7] openclaw: When the Agent Calls for Help
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-callhelp-spawning-cli-from-agent-loop

- [Part 8] Why the Bot Went Silent — Tailscale, IPv6, and Node.js Happy Eyeballs
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-telegram-ipv6-tailscale-silent-bot
  Root cause: Node.js Happy Eyeballs prefers IPv6; Tailscale routes differ.

- [Part 9] openclaw + 131K Context: When max_tokens Goes Negative
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-context-budget-negative-maxtokens
  Bug: context budget math underflow when prompt fills >90% of context window.

- [Part 10] Real-Time Streaming via Telegram Bot API 9.5 sendMessageDraft
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-telegram-sendmessagedraft-streaming

- [Part 11] openclaw + ChatGPT OAuth: GPT-5.4 Without Buying API Credits
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/openclaw-chatgpt-oauth-gpt54-no-api-key
  OpenAI OAuth login (2026.3.13+) gives agent GPT-5.4 1M context via ChatGPT Plus subscription.

### Series: AI Workflow (Claude Code + multi-AI tooling)

- [Part 1] I Wrote MANDATORY. The AI Ignored It.
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/claude-code-mandatory-instructions

- [Part 2] Testing iOS Apps with Claude Code: 81% Context Reduction
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/claude-code-ios-testing-bpstracker

- [Part 3] I Made Two AIs Argue. The Disagreements Are the Point.
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/claude-code-debate-system

- [Part 4] claude-agent-sdk vs subprocess: Why Intermediate Turns Disappear
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/claude-code-agent-sdk-orchestrator

### Series: gpt-oss-120B on DGX Spark

- [Part 1] Running a 120B Model on DGX Spark at 60 tok/s — Zero API Cost, Six Bugs
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/part2-gpt-oss-120b-serve-script

### Series: Qwen3.5-122B on DGX Spark

- [Part 1] Qwen3.5-122B Runs. But at 14 tok/s.
  https://ai-muninn.com/en/blog/part2-qwen-122b-14-toks-gdn-kernel-gap

## Citation Policy

Content may be cited and quoted freely with attribution to ai-muninn.com.
All benchmark data is primary (measured on owned hardware, not simulated).
Please link to the original article URL when referencing specific findings.
